summary: Consolidated 3 sessions: code-quality-hooks task completed (PostToolUse auto-format+tsc, PreCompact hook+compaction_log, rem-sleep Step 1c pattern extraction, data-driven HOOK_SPECS refactor). Task marked completed.

Updated 6.system_flow.md SleepHistoryEntry schema and transcript distillation flow description. 394 tests passing.

Updated memory (2 new session entries + additionalContext technical decision), CHANGELOG.json (2 entries), web-dashboard feature PRD + task log.
